title: pilosella piloselloides subsp. rubrobauhinii
intro: Pilosella piloselloides subsp. rubrobauhinii is a subspecies of the Pilosella piloselloides plant, also known as red-stemmed mouse-ear hawk's-beard, a perennial herb in the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Pilosella piloselloides subsp. rubrobauhinii include reducing inflammation, fighting off bacterial and fungal infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin issues and internally to support overall health.
